reviews.review_description: Has promise but rubbish at the moment, going along and all of a sudden you start going backwards, no explanation as to why,

Downloads and installed fine, runs in both destination and career modes but then when you get to your first station and you pull up and stop that's as far as the game goes.... It just sits there . I've tried opening the doors, putting the brake in full on position and off position but there's no progression, you have to quit the game... Obviously a bug... Graphics aren't to bad... Need's far more work and bug fix... I'm used oculus quest 2....

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and for reporting this issue. Good news — the station progression bug you mentioned has now been fixed in the latest update. Please make sure your game is updated to the newest version and it should work as expected. We really appreciate your patience and your helpful feedback. If you run into anything else, feel free to let us know.

reviews.review_description: Pretty good for the sale price,graphics not too bad ,bit blocky but looks good….controls are simple and responsive  and ideal for a youngster,option to buy other locomotives  worth a good look for the price

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your kind review! 
I’m really glad you enjoyed the game and found the controls easy to use. I’ll keep working on improving the graphics and adding more locomotives to make it even better. Your feedback means a lot — thanks for playing and supporting the game!
